role: The orchestrator that executes a real-world assessment by binding a subject's evidence to the read-only graph, running the engine pipeline along a selected decision pathway, and emitting a fully traceable, ruling-free decision-support assessment.
guarantees: No rulings, no fatwas, no halal/haram determinations — decision-support only.
Deterministic Python computes all scores; Claude writes only validated prose.
Every conclusion is doubly traceable: node-cited (graph id) AND evidence-cited (evidence_id).
Interpretive/low-confidence outputs route to scholar_review_workflow and are labelled, never asserted.
Graph and node files are read-only at runtime (no mutation).

orchestration.controller: ethical_intelligence_orchestrator (graph node) — sequences engines, gates, and review.
orchestration.determinism: Same evidence snapshot + same graph version + same engine versions => identical scores (hash-pinned).
orchestration.caching: per-subject AssessmentResult cached on (subject_ref, evidence_snapshot_hash, graph_version); prose cached on fact-pack hash.

execution_flow.name: ingest_evidence
execution_flow.does: Pull SAY/DO/SHOW EvidenceRecords for the subject from the Evidence Layer; snapshot + hash them.

execution_flow.name: activate_nodes
execution_flow.does: Embedding-match evidence to graph principle nodes; inherit confidence + scholar_review flags.

execution_flow.name: select_pathway
execution_flow.does: Match subject + activated nodes to one or more of the 50 decision pathways by shared nodes/sector.

execution_flow.name: traverse_graph
execution_flow.does: Run the pathway traversal: gates first (red_line_hudud_gate, harm_prevention_gate), then domain layers.

execution_flow.name: harm_signals
execution_flow.does: Score corroborated harms + greenwashing gap; run harm gate.

execution_flow.name: tradeoff
execution_flow.does: Weigh benefit vs harm under Maqasid priority + red-line constraints.

execution_flow.name: governance
execution_flow.does: Accountability chain + corruption/capture/conflict scan (critical for SOEs).

execution_flow.name: moral_compass
execution_flow.does: Composite score+band + Mizan 6-dim + Maqasid dashboard + grounded prose (numeric-guarded).

execution_flow.name: wisdom_synthesis
execution_flow.does: Apex synthesis; surface uncertainty; defer interpretive points to scholar review; no ruling.

AssessmentResult.disclaimer: AI-assisted, indicative, decision-support only; not investment, legal, financial, or religious advice; not a ruling.

api.POST /api/v1/assess: {RuntimeRequest} -> enqueue assessment job (async, audit-job pattern) -> job_id
api.GET /api/v1/assess/{subject_ref}/explai: node+evidence provenance for a single output

explainability: Every numeric output carries nodes[] + evidence_ids[]; /trace replays the engine sequence; /explain resolves a single field to its graph nodes (with ayah_index provenance, labels preserved) and source evidence. The numeric-validation guard rejects any Claude number absent from the fact-pack.
uncertainty: evidence_confidence_grader gates inputs; scholar_review_required propagates from any activated interpretive node to scholar_review_flags; low aggregate confidence sets a review-required banner; nothing interpretive is asserted as fact.
